breaking_news_suggestions.headline: 8 Dome Predictions Officially Pass to Silent-Ignore After April Deadline
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Eight predictions with April 2026 close dates are now 8.46 days past deadline with zero dome-side adjudication. Seven standard-physics predictions logged as FAIL-011 through FAIL-017; PRED-106 (Ca²⁺ ICR bioelectromagnetics) advances to silent_ignore with tacit_withdrawal pending at d=14. This is the largest single-run failure batch in the review's history.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Largest single-batch failure entry: 8 predictions in one run. Dome silence at d=8+ is now a documented pattern (PRED-072, PRED-105, now 8 more). Makes the silence-as-tactic argument empirically stronger.
